title: collomia parviflora f. humilis
intro: Collomia parviflora f. humilis, also known as dwarf collomia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Polemoniaceae. The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Collomia parviflora f. humilis include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and treating respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to leverage its medicinal properties.
